description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build NPM Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow should have two jobs: build-slice-compilers and pack-npm. The build-slice-compilers job should use a matrix strategy to build slice2js compilers for multiple platforms (macos-arm64, windows-x64, linux-x64, linux-arm64) and upload the artifacts. The pack-npm job should run on ubuntu-24.04, depend on the build-slice-compilers job, download the compiler artifacts, copy the binaries to a staging path, build JS, pack npm, and upload the resulting NPM packages.
